name: transcript-fixer
description: Corrects speech-to-text transcription errors using dictionary rules and AI-powered analysis. Builds personalized correction databases that learn from each fix, and auto-loads person-name ASR variants from your people roster. Triggers when working with ASR/STT output containing recognition errors, homophones, garbled technical terms, person-name errors, or Chinese/English mixed content. Also triggers on requests to clean up meeting notes, lecture transcripts, interview recordings, or any text pro
author: daymade
